title: Crispy Fish Bites with Norwegian Remoulade
description: A delicious snack made with crispy fried fish bites served with a creamy Norwegian-inspired remoulade sauce.

ingredients.name: Norwegian fish fillets
ingredients.notes: White fish such as cod or haddock works well

instructions: Cut the fish fillets into bite-sized pieces.
In a shallow dish, mix together the breadcrumbs and crushed crisps.
Dip each piece of fish into the breadcrumb mixture, pressing gently to coat.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add a few pieces of the coated fish to the skillet and fry until golden brown and cooked through, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Remove the fish from the skillet and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
In a separate bowl, mix together the mayonnaise, lemon juice, and garlic powder.
Stir in the chopped fresh dill.
Serve the fried fish bites with the Norwegian remoulade sauce for dipping.
Garnish with additional chopped fresh dill, if desired.
